message: Node started: Calculate the microcanonical entropy S(x, n, l) for a freely jointed chain of n segments with fixed end-to-end distance x. Start from the configuration space volume for a chain of n links with fixed length l and total displacement x. Use the approximation for large n where the volume scales with (1 - (x/nl)^2)^((3n-3)/2) or similar depending on the specific dimensionality and constraints. Provide the expression for S as a function of x, n, and l.
